title: Catanthera ovata

Catanthera ovata is closely related to other species in the same genus, such as Catanthera szechuanensis and Catanthera yunnanensis. The classification of Catanthera ovata is an ongoing area of research in botany, as scientists continue to study and understand the relationships between plant species.
